---
name: Documentation Gap
about: Report missing, unclear, or outdated documentation
title: '[DOCS] '
labels: documentation
assignees: ''
---

## Documentation Area
- [ ] README.md
- [ ] docs/ directory
- [ ] scripts/README.md
- [ ] Code comments/docstrings
- [ ] CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] Architecture documentation
- [ ] Troubleshooting guide
- [ ] Other: _____

## Issue Type
- [ ] Missing documentation (topic not covered)
- [ ] Unclear documentation (needs clarification)
- [ ] Outdated documentation (information is stale)
- [ ] Incorrect documentation (contains errors)
- [ ] Hard to find (needs better organization/linking)

## Description
Explain what's missing, unclear, or incorrect.

## Target Audience
Who needs this information?
- [ ] New contributors
- [ ] Researchers running hypothesis tests
- [ ] Developers extending the pipeline
- [ ] Security auditors
- [ ] Other: _____

## Suggested Content
Draft or outline of what the documentation should include.

## Related Issues
Link to any related issues or PRs.

## Priority
- [ ] Low (nice to have)
- [ ] Medium (helpful for current work)
- [ ] High (blocking progress)
- [ ] Critical (causing errors/confusion)
